description: This command is designed for MP. Hides object on all connected clients as well as JIP. Can be used on static objects. In singleplayer this command behaves just like [[hideObject]].
examples:
<sqf>
hideObjectGlobal myObject; // hides myObject
hideObjectGlobal nearestBuilding [2500, 2500, 0];
</sqf>

<sqf>
myObject hideObjectGlobal true;	// hides myObject
myObject hideObjectGlobal false;	// shows myObject
</sqf>
<sqf>[myObject, true] remoteExec ["hideObjectGlobal", 2]; // remote-executes hideObjectGlobal from a client to the server</sqf>
name: hideObjectGlobal
